title: Delicate Peppery Mediterranean Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and comforting Mediterranean chicken dish featuring lemongrass and miso, perfect for a sick day, and diabetic-friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the lemongrass, garlic, thyme, salt, black pepper, and crushed red pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and chicken broth until smooth.
Pour the miso mixture over the chicken and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened, about 25-30 minutes.
Remove the lemongrass stalks and serve the chicken and sauce over couscous or rice.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
